title: Senior Mechanical Engineer
description:
Are you a visionary Senior Mechanical Engineer ready to leave your mark on groundbreaking projects? We celebrate achievements and encourage every member to contribute their unique perspective.Impact: Your work as a Senior Mechanical Engineer will directly influence the success of our projects, shaping the future of our products and solutions. You will be pivotal in delivering high-quality, reliable, and innovative mechanical designs that make a tangible difference.

Requirements:
Are you ready to elevate your career and contribute to groundbreaking engineering projects? We are looking for an Experienced Senior Mechanical Engineer with a passion for innovation and a proven track record of success!Required Skills:Exceptional proficiency in Engineering and Mechanical Engineering principles.Demonstrated expertise with CAD Software (e.g., SolidWorks, AutoCAD) for design and modeling.Strong capabilities in FEA Analysis and other simulation tools.Hands-on experience with Prototyping and design validation.A solid understanding of Design Optimization techniques.Proven ability in Project Management within an engineering context.Excellent Problem-solving skills and analytical thinking.A knack for clear and concise Technical Documentation.In-depth knowledge of Fluid Dynamics, Thermodynamics, and Materials Science.Experience Requirements:A minimum of 5-7 years of progressive experience in Mechanical Engineering, demonstrating increasing levels of responsibility and technical leadership.Career Level Expectations:This role is perfect for an Experienced professional who is ready to take on significant design challenges, mentor junior team members, and drive technical excellence within a leading engineering firm.

title: ASP.NET Developer (AI-Assisted Development)
description:
We're looking for an ASP.NET Developer with around 1 year of experience who is skilled at using AI tools to write, debug, and improve code. You'll help build and maintain web applications and APIs using ASP.NET and C#, while using AI assistants to work faster and learn quickly. This is a great fit for an early-career developer who is genuinely productive with AI tools and eager to grow into a strong engineer. What You'll Do- Build and maintain web applications and APIs using ASP.NET Core, C#, and the .NET ecosystem.- Write clean, working code with the help of AI coding assistants — and review that output critically instead of trusting it blindly.- Implement features, fix bugs, and improve existing code.- Work with databases (SQL Server / Entity Framework), writing and optimizing queries.- Build and consume RESTful APIs.- Use AI tools to speed up debugging, refactoring, writing tests, and generating documentation.- Collaborate with the team using Git, pull requests, and code reviews.- Learn the codebase and the business domain quickly, asking good questions along the way.

Requirements:
- Around 1 year of experience developing with ASP.NET / ASP.NET Core and C#.- Solid C# fundamentals (OOP, async/await, LINQ).- Experience with at least one front-end basics layer: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Razor, Blazor, or a JS framework is a plus).- Experience with relational databases (SQL Server preferred) and an ORM like Entity Framework.- Comfortable building or consuming REST APIs.- Hands-on, practical skill using AI coding tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude, or similar) to write and debug code effectively.- Familiarity with Git and basic version-control workflows.- Good problem-solving skills and the judgment to verify AI-generated code rather than ship it unchecked.- Clear communication and willingness to learn. Nice to Have- Experience with Blazor, MVC, or Web API in depth.- Exposure to cloud platforms (Azure preferred, or AWS).- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and Docker.- Experience writing unit tests (xUnit, NUnit).- Prompt engineering skill for generating code, tests, or documentation.- Interest in integrating AI features into applications (e.g., calling LLM APIs, building chat or assistant features).How We Use AI in Development (so you know what to expect)- *Coding:* AI assistants for writing, refactoring, and explaining code.- *Debugging:* using AI to investigate errors and suggest fixes faster.- *Testing & docs:* generating draft unit tests and documentation, then reviewing them.- *Learning:* using AI to ramp up on unfamiliar parts of the codebase.We treat AI as a tool that makes good developers faster — not a substitute for understanding your own code. You're always expected to review and own what you ship. What Success Looks Like (First 6 Months)- Comfortable with our codebase, tools, and Git workflow.- Shipping features and bug fixes with minimal hand-holding.- Using AI tools to work efficiently while producing reliable, reviewed code.- Growing your C# / ASP.NET depth and contributing well within the team.

title: QA / Software Test Engineer (AI-Augmented Testing)
description:
We're looking for a Software Test Engineer with around 2 years of experience who combines solid testing fundamentals with curiosity about using AI to make testing faster and more reliable. You'll help ensure the quality of our products by designing and running tests, building automation, and applying AI tools to generate tests, analyze failures, and cut down on manual effort. This is a great fit for someone early in their QA career who wants to grow while working with modern, AI-assisted testing practices. What You'll Do- Write and maintain test cases and automated tests across web, API, and/or mobile.- Use AI-assisted tools to help generate test cases, create test data, and expand coverage from user stories or requirements.- Build and maintain automated tests (UI, API, regression) and help keep them running in CI/CD pipelines.- Use AI to speed up failure triage — grouping similar failures and flagging flaky tests.- Work with self-healing automation and AI-driven locators to reduce test maintenance.- Perform functional, regression, and exploratory testing.- Review AI-generated tests and output critically — checking correctness and removing noise rather than trusting it blindly.- Track, document, and clearly report bugs, and work with developers to get them resolved.- Learn and experiment with new AI testing tools, and share what works with the team.

Requirements:
- Around 2 years (roughly 1–3) of experience in software testing or QA.- Good understanding of testing fundamentals: test case design, regression, the test pyramid, and the bug life cycle.- Experience writing automated tests with a framework such as Selenium, Playwright, Cypress, or Appium.- Basic-to-intermediate scripting ability in at least one language (e.g., Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, or C#).- Some hands-on experience using AI tools in a development or testing workflow (e.g., LLM-based assistants or AI test generators) — or clear enthusiasm to learn.- Experience testing APIs (REST) with a tool like Postman.- Familiarity with version control (Git) and basic CI/CD concepts.- Attention to detail and the judgment to question results — including AI output that looks wrong.- Clear written and verbal communication.Nice to Have- Exposure to AI-powered or self-healing testing platforms.- Some prompt engineering experience for generating tests, test data, or documentation.- Basic knowledge of performance testing (JMeter, k6) or security testing.- Curiosity about testing AI/ML features (validating model outputs, prompt regression, hallucination or safety checks).- Familiarity with Docker or cloud test environments.- ISTQB Foundation (or similar) certification. How We Use AI in Testing (so you know what to expect)- *Test generation:* turning requirements and code into draft test cases and data.- *Maintenance:* self-healing locators and AI suggestions to cut down on broken tests.- *Analysis:* automatic failure grouping, flaky-test detection, and prioritizing what to fix first.- *Productivity:* AI assistants for writing scripts, documentation, and bug reports — always with human review.We treat AI as a helper, not a replacement for engineering judgment. You'll always be expected to check and own the quality of what ships. What Success Looks Like (First 6 Months)- Ramped up on our products, test suites, and CI/CD pipeline.- Contributing reliable automated tests and helping reduce manual regression effort.- Using AI tools to speed up test creation or failure triage in a measurable way.- Working well with developers to help ship high-quality releases.

Are you a budding engineer with a passion for precision and innovation? Do you thrive in a dynamic, hands-on environment where your designs come to life? We are seeking an enthusiastic and detail-oriented Entry-Level Technical Office Engineer to join our vibrant team in Monufya, Egypt! This is an exceptional on-site opportunity to kickstart your career, transforming concepts into tangible engineering solutions and playing a pivotal role in project execution. What You'll Do: Your Impactful Responsibilities Design & Development: Engage in critical mechanical design tasks, utilizing advanced CAD software like AutoCAD, SolidWorks, and Autodesk to create detailed 2D and 3D models.Technical Documentation: Prepare comprehensive shop drawings, technical specifications, and Bill of Materials (BOMs) ensuring accuracy and adherence to engineering standards.Project Support: Assist in project coordination, ensuring seamless communication between design, production, and installation teams.Innovation & Optimization: Contribute to the optimization of sheet metal designs and fabrication processes, constantly seeking improvements.Problem Solving: Apply your analytical skills to troubleshoot design challenges and propose effective engineering solutions.Collaboration: Work closely with senior engineers and production staff, learning best practices and contributing to a collaborative team environment. Skills & Technologies You'll Master: You'll immerse yourself in a world of cutting-edge tools and methodologies, including:Mechanical Engineering & Design PrinciplesAdvanced CAD/CAM TechniquesProficiency in AutoCAD, SolidWorks, and Autodesk Specialized Sheet Metal DesignCreation of precise Shop DrawingsEffective use of Microsoft Office Suite for reporting and presentationsFoundational knowledge in Mechatronics Growth Opportunities & Team Culture:At our company, we believe in nurturing talent. As an Entry-Level Technical Office Engineer, you'll have unparalleled opportunities for professional development, mentorship from experienced engineers, and a clear career path. Our team in Monufya is built on a foundation of collaboration, mutual respect, and a shared drive for excellence. You'll be part of a supportive and innovative culture that encourages continuous learning and welcomes fresh perspectives. We celebrate successes and tackle challenges together! Your Impact:You will be instrumental in the successful delivery of our engineering projects, directly contributing to the quality, efficiency, and innovation of our products. Your meticulous work in the technical office will lay the groundwork for excellence in manufacturing and installation, making a tangible difference from day one.

Requirements:
Educational Excellence: Hold a Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, or a closely related field.Foundational Experience: Possess 0-3 years of experience in a technical office or design role; fresh graduates with strong academic projects are highly encouraged to apply!Technical Prowess: Demonstrate proficiency in:Mechanical Engineering principles and practices.Mechanical Design and drafting standards.Leading CAD Software such as AutoCAD, SolidWorks.CAD/CAM methodologies.Creating accurate Shop Drawings and Technical Documentation.Sheet Metal Design expertise.Working knowledge of Mechatronics concepts.Proficiency with the Microsoft Office Suite.Professional Competencies: Exhibit strong abilities in:Project Coordination and organizational tasks.Problem-solving with a keen analytical mind.Exceptional Attention to Detail.Excellent Communication Skills (written and verbal).Career Level: This is an exciting opportunity for an Entry-Level professional ready to grow and make a significant contribution.

title: Business System Analyst
description:
Andersen is hiring a Business/System Analyst for a project focused on the digital transformation and modernization of healthcare systems delivering therapeutic and laboratory services. Compensation: $8–10k+, negotiable for senior candidates. The customer is a leading healthcare provider in Saudi Arabia. It is committed to providing high-quality healthcare using advanced technology and highly qualified staff in a safe and conducive environment. The company secured the top position in patient safety standards with an exceptional evaluation score of 99.7% in the Essential Safety Requirements (ESR). The project is focused on the modernization and digital transformation of a healthcare provider that delivers therapeutic and laboratory services for residents of a large metropolitan area and surrounding region. Responsibilities: Demonstrating the delivery approach and methodology for Phase 1.Identifying key stakeholders and defining the project governance structure, including the RACI matrix, communication plan, reporting cadence, and decision-making processes.Validating and refining the project's scope, priorities, assumptions, and expectations.Conducting Phase 0 workshops, including kickoff, scope validation, compliance, dependency mapping, system demos, architecture and NFR review, estimation calibration, integration review, delivery planning, and phase closeout.Documenting systems that require integration.Preparing Phase 0 documentation and results.Preparing the Requirements Management Plan.Preparing Phase 1 CP document.Reasons why this job would be interesting to you: - Andersen cooperates with such businesses as Samsung, Reuter Gruppe, T-Systems, TUI, Ryanair, Johnson & Johnson, etc. This project is just your beginning here – working with us means reliability and prospects. - We have been strengthening our expertise since 2007. During this time, we have formed an excellent BA & SA team with streamlined processes, which now consists of more than 200 qualified analysts. - We welcome specialists from every part of the world. - Salaries at Andersen are pegged to the USD, and our employees are provided with a benefit package and an extensive set of bonuses. - We give our employees an opportunity to attend and participate in the company’s BA meetups, as well as offer a compensation program for international professional certificates. - There are many different ways to grow and develop at our company. You can improve as a tech specialist or a resource manager, and all your activities will be decently rewarded. - You will have an opportunity to take on the role of a mentor and help a group of BA/SA beginners grow. - Our employees have access to Andersen Knowledge Base, where they can take courses in a variety of areas: the art of negotiation, PreSale & Discovery, Agile essentials, product ownership, microservice architecture, API design, SQL, AWS, GDPR, UX/UI, people management, and more. Join us!

Requirements:

title: Financial Analyst - Evening Shift 3 -11 PM
description:
Job Title: Financial Planning and Cost Control Specialist (Remote) Job Objective: To contribute to enhancing the company's profitability and financial sustainability through effective control of costs and purchases, preparing financial analyses, setting financial plans and objectives, and providing the necessary recommendations to improve the company's financial performance. Duties and Responsibilities: Prepare and update the approved price list for all raw materials, products, and services purchased by the company, ensuring its periodic review in accordance with market conditions. Review and approve price quotations and new purchases, ensuring their compliance with approved prices and the company's financial policies, and submit necessary recommendations in case of deviations. Continuously audit and review all company purchases to ensure their accuracy and validity, analyze the reasons for cost increases, and take appropriate corrective actions. Conduct periodic financial analyses of the highest-cost and highest-consumption items, identifying opportunities to improve operational efficiency and reduce costs without affecting the quality of products or services. Continuously update price and cost databases, monitor changes in supplier prices, and prepare reports illustrating their impact on company profitability. Prepare annual and monthly financial plans, setting the necessary financial targets to ensure profitability and cover the company's operating costs. Prepare and monitor estimated budgets and cash flows, analyze deviations between actual results and financial targets, and propose appropriate solutions. Periodically review the company's financial structure, analyze the alignment of expenses and obligations with income and revenue levels, and provide recommendations for improving financial efficiency. Prepare periodic financial and analytical reports for senior management, including Key performance indicators (KPIs), profitability ratios, and recommendations for improving financial performance. Collaborating with various departments to ensure adherence to approved financial policies and optimal resource utilization. Performing any other tasks related to financial planning or cost control assigned by management. Working Hours and Days: Job Type: Remote. Working Hours: 3:00 PM to 11:00 PM Saudi Arabia Time. Working Days: 6 days a week. Weekly Day Off: One day to be determined in agreement with management. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): Adherence to approved purchase prices. Value of financial savings achieved from cost reduction initiatives. Accuracy of financial forecasts compared to actual results. Deviation from the approved budget. Improvement in the company's gross profit margin. Regularity and accuracy of financial reports submitted to management. Speed and accuracy of reviewing and approving purchase orders and quotations. Number of financial initiatives and improvements that contributed to enhancing the company's profitability or improving its operational efficiency.

Requirements:
Required Qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field. At least 3 years of experience in financial analysis, financial planning, or cost control. Previous experience in the restaurant or food and beverage (F&B) sector is preferred. Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and strong ability to build financial models and analyze data. Ability to prepare budgets and financial forecasts and analyze variances. Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills. Excellent time management, prioritization, and remote work skills. Job-Specific Requirements: Ability to work independently and take responsibility without requiring direct supervision or constant monitoring. Commitment to achieving results and maintaining a high level of productivity and efficiency in completing tasks. Initiative and the ability to proactively propose improvements and financial solutions. Ability to manage multiple tasks and projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.
